title: Parkio Daily for May 31, 2026
teaser: Big Thunder reopens with updates, new Hollywood Studios Animation experience announced, and queue damage reported at Rock 'n' Roller Coaster.

rides.name: Big Thunder Mountain Railroad
rides.note: Just reopened after 16 months; waits lower than typical thanks to fresh novelty window

rides.name: Soarin' Around the World
rides.note: Memorial Day weekend crowds have passed; mid-morning windows often under 30 minutes

rides.name: Rock 'n' Roller Coaster Starring The Muppets
rides.note: New Muppets theme driving long waits; rope-drop or evening hours recommended

bignews.title: Big Thunder Mountain Railroad reopens with visible updates after 16-month closure
bignews.body: The classic Magic Kingdom coaster returned to operation following a major refurbishment. Guests report new effects and improved infrastructure, though some enhancements remain unfinished.

parkioInsight.text: The first two weeks after a major reopening usually see lighter crowds than typical. Ride during the first hour or final two hours of park operation to avoid peak demand.

bignews.title: Disney Animation-inspired experience confirmed for Hollywood Studios
bignews.body: A new walk-through bringing Walt Disney Animation Studios characters and settings to life is in development. The experience will evoke the studio's Burbank campus and let guests interact with animated characters in physical form.

parkioInsight.text: No opening date is public yet, but Hollywood Studios tends to preview new attractions during soft openings. Keep an eye on the Studios Lot area for unannounced access in coming months.

bignews.title: Guests peel paint off Rock 'n' Roller Coaster queue within days of Muppets reopening
bignews.body: Less than a week after the attraction launched its Electric Mayhem makeover, visible damage appeared along the standby queue walls. Guests have been removing fresh paint as souvenirs.

parkioInsight.text: Queue aesthetics may look worn faster than expected. If theming details matter to your experience, ride sooner rather than later before more deterioration occurs.

bignews.title: Bluey's Wild World dropping virtual queue system soon
bignews.body: The Animal Kingdom dance party opened this week with a virtual-queue-only model but will transition to a standby line in the near future. Disney has not yet announced the exact cutover date.

parkioInsight.text: Virtual queues typically fill within seconds at park open. If the standby line arrives before your trip, mid-afternoon slots often see lighter foot traffic than morning or evening shows.

topstories.title: Banana Ball exhibition games coming to ESPN Wide World of Sports in 2026
topstories.body: The theatrical baseball league announced on ESPN2 that Walt Disney World will host Banana Ball events later this year. Specific game dates were revealed during the live City Selection Show.

parkioInsight.text: Sporting events at Wide World of Sports tend to congest resort transportation and nearby parking. If staying at BoardWalk or Yacht Club during game days, allow extra travel time to Magic Kingdom or EPCOT.

topstories.title: Two new summer drinks debut at eet by Maneet Chauhan in Disney Springs
topstories.body: A cotton candy margarita and a second beverage with a decorative tiger garnish are now available. Both are limited-time offerings for the summer season.

parkioInsight.text: Specialty drinks at Disney Springs restaurants often sell out or run low on garnishes by evening. Stop by during early afternoon to secure the full presentation.

topstories.title: Chicken Guy adds two limited-time menu items for summer
topstories.body: The Disney Springs quick-service has introduced a new shake and an additional item through the end of summer. Reviews suggest both are strong additions worth trying.

parkioInsight.text: Chicken Guy lunch rushes typically peak between noon and 1:30pm. Visiting before 11:30am or after 2pm usually cuts wait time in half.

topstories.title: Victoria and Albert's retains Michelin Star as second Disney World restaurant loses recognition
topstories.body: The 2026 Florida Michelin Guide confirmed the Grand Floridian flagship kept its star. Another Walt Disney World venue dropped from the list entirely, though the specific restaurant was not named in available sources.

parkioInsight.text: Michelin recognition tends to tighten reservations for weeks after the announcement. Book Victoria and Albert's at the 60-day window if dining there is a priority.

topstories.title: Port Orleans Riverside Magnolia Bend rooms complete refurbishment
topstories.body: The moderate resort has unveiled updated guest rooms in the Magnolia Bend section. New finishes and fixtures are now in place across the building.

parkioInsight.text: Newly refurbished resort rooms often carry the same nightly rate as older wings for a brief period. Request Magnolia Bend when booking to secure fresh accommodations at no premium.

topstories.title: Art of Animation Resort room reimagining scheduled for 2027
topstories.body: Disney confirmed the value resort will receive its first hard-goods overhaul since opening nearly 15 years ago. The project follows similar updates at Pop Century and the All-Star resorts.

parkioInsight.text: Resort refurbishments typically happen in phases, closing entire buildings. If Art of Animation is your top pick for 2027, confirm room availability in non-construction wings before finalizing dates.

topstories.title: Live-action Moana photo opportunity installed at Disney Springs
topstories.body: A billboard-style backdrop featuring characters from the upcoming July film now stands near Earl of Sandwich. Guests can pose with imagery of Moana and Maui ahead of the theatrical release.

parkioInsight.text: Photo ops in Disney Springs tend to attract crowds during evening dining hours. Visit in mid-afternoon or late morning for shorter lines and better lighting.

icymi.title: Pastel monochrome plush accessories featuring Stitch, Pooh, Donald, and Mickey arrive at both coasts
icymi.body: Claw clips and other accessories in single-color palettes are now sold at Walt Disney World and Disneyland Resort. Each character is rendered in a distinct pastel shade.

icymi.title: Her Universe releases retro Walt Disney World marquee mini tote bag
icymi.body: The bag features the classic entrance sign and is part of a varsity-themed parks collection. It is available at Magic Kingdom's Uptown Jewelers and online at the Disney Store.

icymi.title: Disney Springs launches Summer 2026 signage and Cool Kids guides
icymi.body: New banners and printed maps highlight family programming and seasonal offerings across the shopping and dining district. The initiative targets school-break visitors.

icymi.title: BoardWalk confirms multiple projects for vacant restaurant and retail spaces
icymi.body: Walt Disney World acknowledged that at least two new tenants are in the works for empty storefronts along the promenade. No brands or opening timelines have been disclosed.

spotlight.title: Soarin' now features updated Across America content at EPCOT
spotlight.body: The Land pavilion attraction has swapped in new North American footage, replacing portions of the previous Soarin' Around the World film. The change went live this week and includes fresh aerial sequences.

parkioInsight.text: Flight-film updates typically draw curious repeat riders for the first few weeks. Early-morning Lightning Lane inventory tends to last longer than standby windows under 20 minutes during the 9–10am hour.

videos.summary: WrightDownMainStreet samples new menu additions at Pop Century, Art of Animation, and All-Star Resorts, highlighting recent changes to value-resort dining.

videos.summary: A comprehensive tasting tour of summer 2026 limited-time offerings across Walt Disney World, including items tied to Muppets, Bluey, and Star Wars themes.

videos.summary: A full 4K livestream of Happily Ever After fireworks at Magic Kingdom, capturing the complete nighttime spectacular in high resolution.
